title: Trump Issues 10-Day Deadline for Iran Deal
detail: President Trump publicly demands Iran accept a 'full denuclearization deal' within 10 days or face 'consequences the likes of which few have ever seen.' White House says all options are on the table. European allies urge restraint. Iran's Foreign Ministry calls it 'psychological warfare' and rejects preconditions.

title: NATO Bases Activated: Souda Bay and Incirlik
detail: US Navy establishes forward logistics hub at Souda Bay, Crete for ammunition and fuel resupply to Ford carrier strike group. Simultaneously, KC-135 tankers deploy to Incirlik AB, Turkey, though Ankara restricts US to ISR missions only — no combat sorties from Turkish soil. Greece approves unrestricted basing access.
